family_summary: Armed conflict in Libya between Qadhafi-aligned forces and anti-Qadhafi rebels, with foreign intervention led first by a US/UK/France coalition and then by NATO under UNSCR 1973. For DR purposes the bundle is episodeized by city-campaign windows rather than treated as a single national war.
notes: Prompt-constrained bundle covering 2011-02-15 through 2011-10-31. Episode-first splitting is used to avoid misleading whole-country denominators in subnational urban campaigns.
